page_metadata.biotools__summary: The BioInformatics Prokaryotes Quick Phylogeny is designed to reconstruct the phylogeny of an Archaea or a Bacteria from its nucleic acid sequence. It is also giving the useful informations if species identification is needed.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The BioInformatics Prokaryotes Quick Phylogeny is designed to reconstruct the phylogeny of an Archaea or a Bacteria from its nucleic acid sequence. It is also giving the useful informations if species identification is needed.
